about: The brand primitives that lynox paints on more than one surface: this product UI,
and the lynox.ai marketing site. Same brand, different codebases — so the values
are necessarily duplicated. This file is the contract that keeps the duplication
honest, and it is the ONLY thing that can: the website is a standalone Astro site
and must not depend on this package (that would drag a Svelte UI into a marketing
site and couple its build to core releases).
If you change one of these values in app.css, `pnpm tokens:contract` fails — here,
in this repo, on your commit. That is the point. Update this file in the same
change, and know that the other surface has to follow.
DARK ONLY. The light ramps are deliberately NOT shared: the product is a tool you
sit in for hours (flat, quiet, neutral-grey ink); the website is scanned in twenty
seconds (tonal depth, violet-tinted ink). Two named contexts, not a bug.
This file names no other repository and no private path. It is a list of colours.

notGuarded.lyx-focus-ring: The other surface has no focus-ring token. Nothing to converge onto yet.
notGuarded.semantic surfaces: success/error fg+bg+border triplets. Only the three standalone FILL colours are shared.
